qualitative_assessment: MP Devesh Chandra Thakur shows mixed transparency performance with a moderate overall score of 44/100. While he maintains a clean criminal record and demonstrates average performance in MPLADS utilization and asset disclosure, significant weaknesses exist in committee participation, legislative activity, and public accessibility. The low data confidence (14%) and multiple validation flags suggest limited reliable information availability.
key_finding: Mixed performance with clean record but poor committee & public engagement
